CustomObject.label: Feature
CustomObject.description: Per-tenant runtime state for a Delivery Hub feature. Each record reflects whether the subscriber org has enabled the matching FeatureDefinition__mdt (which is the package-shipped catalog entry). Layer 4 of the cockpit architecture — PR 1 is read-only scaffold; PR 2 wires bidirectional sync with DeliveryHubSettings__c Enable*DateTime__c fields.
